a:T2da7,<div class="question">
<p><span class="fontstyle0">What is the <math class="wrs_chemistry" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML"><mi mathvariant="normal">H</mi><mo>-</mo><mi mathvariant="normal">H</mi></math> bond enthalpy, in </span><math xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML"><mi>kJ</mi><mo> </mo><msup><mi>mol</mi><mrow><mo>-</mo><mn>1</mn></mrow></msup></math><span class="fontstyle0">, in the </span><math class="wrs_chemistry" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML"><msub><mi mathvariant="normal">H</mi><mn>2</mn></msub></math> <span class="fontstyle0">molecule?</span></p>
<p style="text-align: center;"><math class="wrs_chemistry" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML"><mn>2</mn><msub><mi mathvariant="normal">H</mi><mn>2</mn></msub><mfenced><mi mathvariant="normal">g</mi></mfenced><mo>+</mo><msub><mi mathvariant="normal">O</mi><mn>2</mn></msub><mfenced><mi mathvariant="normal">g</mi></mfenced><mo>→</mo><mn>2</mn><msub><mi mathvariant="normal">H</mi><mn>2</mn></msub><mi mathvariant="normal">O</mi><mfenced><mi mathvariant="normal">g</mi></mfenced></math></p>
<p style="text-align: center;"><math class="wrs_chemistry" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML"><mo>∆</mo><msub><mi>H</mi><mi mathvariant="normal">f</mi></msub><mfenced><mrow><msub><mi mathvariant="normal">H</mi><mn>2</mn></msub><mi mathvariant="normal">O</mi></mrow></mfenced><mo>=</mo><mi>x</mi><mo> </mo><mi>kJ</mi><mo> </mo><msup><mi>mol</mi><mrow><mo>-</mo><mn>1</mn></mrow></msup></math></p>
<p><img height="94" src="data:image/png;base64," style="display: block;margin-left:auto;margin-right:auto;" width="274"/></p>
<p>A.  <math xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML"><mi>x</mi><mo>-</mo><mi>y</mi><mo>+</mo><mn>4</mn><mi>z</mi></math></p>
<p>B.  <math xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML"><mfrac><mn>1</mn><mn>2</mn></mfrac><mfenced><mrow><mi>x</mi><mo>-</mo><mi>y</mi><mo>+</mo><mn>4</mn><mi>z</mi></mrow></mfenced></math></p>
<p>C.  <math xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML"><mi>x</mi><mo>-</mo><mi>y</mi><mo>+</mo><mn>2</mn><mi>z</mi></math></p>
<p>D.  <math xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML"><mfrac><mn>1</mn><mn>2</mn></mfrac><mfenced><mrow><mi>x</mi><mo>-</mo><mi>y</mi><mo>+</mo><mn>2</mn><mi>z</mi></mrow></mfenced></math></p>
